prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_affected_field primary_response_unit_1)
(register_affected_field secondary_response_unit_1)
(register_affected_field recovery_operation_1)
(register_affected_field recovery_operation_2)
(allocate_contingency_resource_to_entity primary_response_unit_1 contingency_resource_1)
(allocate_contingency_resource_to_entity secondary_response_unit_1 contingency_resource_2)
(allocate_contingency_resource_to_entity recovery_operation_1 contingency_resource_3)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity primary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(complete_entity_assessment primary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(return_assessment_kit primary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity secondary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)

(inspect_inundation_zone_by_primary_unit primary_response_unit_1 inundation_zone_1 assessment_kit_1)
(deploy_supply_to_primary_response_unit primary_response_unit_1 inundation_zone_1 supply_item_1)
(finalize_primary_unit_inspection primary_response_unit_1 inundation_zone_1 assessment_kit_1 supply_item_1)
(return_assessment_kit primary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity secondary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(inspect_inundation_zone_by_secondary_unit secondary_response_unit_1 access_route_1 assessment_kit_1)
(deploy_supply_to_secondary_response_unit secondary_response_unit_1 access_route_1 supply_item_1)
(finalize_secondary_unit_inspection secondary_response_unit_1 access_route_1 assessment_kit_1 supply_item_1)
(return_assessment_kit secondary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(stage_deployment_asset primary_response_unit_1 secondary_response_unit_1 inundation_zone_1 access_route_1 deployment_asset_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity primary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(confirm_deployment_asset_deployment deployment_asset_1 primary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(return_assessment_kit primary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity recovery_operation_1 assessment_kit_1)
(complete_entity_assessment recovery_operation_1 assessment_kit_1)
(return_assessment_kit recovery_operation_1 assessment_kit_1)
(process_inspection_report_for_operation recovery_operation_1 inspection_report_1 deployment_asset_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity recovery_operation_1 assessment_kit_1)
(verify_operation_inspection recovery_operation_1 inspection_report_1 deployment_asset_1 assessment_kit_1)
(return_assessment_kit recovery_operation_1 assessment_kit_1)
(assign_decontamination_kit_to_operation recovery_operation_1 decontamination_kit_1)
(engage_specialist_team recovery_operation_1 specialist_team_1)
(assign_decontamination_and_record_inspection_pass recovery_operation_1 decontamination_kit_1 specialist_team_1 inspection_report_1 deployment_asset_1)
(release_specialist_team recovery_operation_1 specialist_team_1)
(return_decontamination_kit_to_pool recovery_operation_1 decontamination_kit_1)
(assign_laboratory_result_to_operation recovery_operation_1 laboratory_result_1)
(attach_laboratory_result_and_mark_operation_ready recovery_operation_1 laboratory_result_1 inspection_report_1 deployment_asset_1)
(return_laboratory_result_to_pool recovery_operation_1 laboratory_result_1)
(finalize_operation_and_mark_cleared recovery_operation_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity recovery_operation_1 assessment_kit_1)
(apply_salvage_option_to_entity recovery_operation_1 salvage_option_1 assessment_kit_1)
(reallocate_resource_and_reinstate_operation recovery_operation_1 contingency_resource_3 salvage_option_1)
(allocate_contingency_resource_to_entity recovery_operation_2 contingency_resource_3)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity recovery_operation_2 assessment_kit_1)
(complete_entity_assessment recovery_operation_2 assessment_kit_1)
(return_assessment_kit recovery_operation_2 assessment_kit_1)
(process_inspection_report_for_operation recovery_operation_2 inspection_report_2 deployment_asset_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity recovery_operation_2 assessment_kit_1)
(verify_operation_inspection recovery_operation_2 inspection_report_2 deployment_asset_1 assessment_kit_1)
(return_assessment_kit recovery_operation_2 assessment_kit_1)
(assign_decontamination_kit_to_operation recovery_operation_2 decontamination_kit_1)
(engage_specialist_team recovery_operation_2 specialist_team_1)
(assign_decontamination_and_record_inspection_pass recovery_operation_2 decontamination_kit_1 specialist_team_1 inspection_report_2 deployment_asset_1)
(release_specialist_team recovery_operation_2 specialist_team_1)
(return_decontamination_kit_to_pool recovery_operation_2 decontamination_kit_1)
(assign_laboratory_result_to_operation recovery_operation_2 laboratory_result_1)
(attach_laboratory_result_and_mark_operation_ready recovery_operation_2 laboratory_result_1 inspection_report_2 deployment_asset_1)
(return_laboratory_result_to_pool recovery_operation_2 laboratory_result_1)
(finalize_operation_and_mark_cleared recovery_operation_2)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity recovery_operation_2 assessment_kit_1)
(apply_salvage_option_to_entity recovery_operation_2 salvage_option_1 assessment_kit_1)
(reallocate_resource_and_reinstate_operation recovery_operation_2 contingency_resource_3 salvage_option_1)
(mark_primary_unit_cleared primary_response_unit_1 deployment_asset_1)
(mark_secondary_unit_cleared secondary_response_unit_1 deployment_asset_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity primary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(apply_salvage_option_to_entity primary_response_unit_1 salvage_option_1 assessment_kit_1)
(reallocate_resource_and_reinstate_primary_unit primary_response_unit_1 contingency_resource_1 salvage_option_1)
(assign_assessment_kit_to_entity secondary_response_unit_1 assessment_kit_1)
(apply_salvage_option_to_entity secondary_response_unit_1 salvage_option_1 assessment_kit_1)
(reallocate_resource_and_reinstate_secondary_unit secondary_response_unit_1 contingency_resource_2 salvage_option_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem is a planning problem in PDDL for flood-affected field recovery. I need to output only the executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions, one per line.


## Understanding the Task  
- The problem involves creating a planning solution in PDDL for recovering flood-affected fields.  
- The goal is to reinstate primary functionality, focusing on executable actions.  

## Defining Output Format  
- The output must be a sequence of ground PDDL actions, with one action per line.  
- Only executable plans are required, excluding any intermediate reasoning or planning steps.

## Identifying Entity States  
- Initially, no entities (primary_response_unit_1, secondary_response_unit_1, recovery_operation_1, _2) have salvage options, resources allocated, or are reported as affected fields.  
- Entities must be registered first using register_affected_field, which requires them not reported and not reinstated, setting affected_field_reported.  

## Outlining Reinstatement Process  
- To reinstate, entities need salvage_option_attached_to_entity, achieved via apply_salvage_option_to_entity, requiring entity_biosecurity_cleared and assessment_kit_assigned.  
- Entity_biosecurity_cleared can be achieved by mark_primary_unit_cleared (for primary units) or finalize_operation (for operations), each with specific preconditions like prepared, ready, or operation_finalized.  

## Detailing Required Steps  
- After registration, allocate contingency resources (affected_field_triaged, resource_allocated_to_entity) to move toward biosecurity clearance.  
- Apply salvage option requires salvage_option_available and assessment_kit_assigned, leading to entity_has_salvage_option and enabling reallocate_resource_and_reinstate_* actions for final reinstatement.

## Examining Operational Requirements  
- Operations need operation_ready_for_closure to finalize, achievable via attach_laboratory_result actions requiring operation_inspection_cleared and specific reports linked to assets.  
- Operation_inspection_cleared comes from decontamination actions like assign_decontamination_and_record_inspection_pass, needing specialist_team_assigned_to_entity and other prerequisites.

## Tracing Inspection Verification  
- Operation inspection verification requires verify_operation_inspection or apply_permit_and_verify_operation, both needing processed inspection reports and specific conditions like assessment_kit assignment.  
- Inspection reports get processed via process_inspection_report_for_operation, which needs entity_assessed, deployment assets staged, and other readiness conditions.

## Managing Resource Constraints  
- Shared resources like assessment_kit_1 and specialist_team_1 must be sequenced properly, with return actions (e.g., return_assessment_kit) enabling reuse.  
- Contingency resources and salvage options are limited but reusable, requiring careful planning to ensure availability for entity reinstatement.

## Expanding Verification Pathways  
- Verify_operation_inspection requires entity_assessed, processed reports linked to assets, and assessment_kit assigned to the recovery operation, ensuring no config1.  
- Apply_permit_and_verify_operation also verifies, needing a permit attached, operation_has_regulatory_permit, and config1, setting permit_recorded.  

## Clarifying Inspection Clearance  
- Assign_decontamination_and_record_inspection_pass clears inspection, requiring verified status, decon_kit assigned, specialist_team on operation, and linked reports, avoiding config2.  
- Reassign actions follow similar rules but involve config2, ensuring flexibility in sequencing.  

## Achieving Closure Readiness  
- Attach_laboratory_result_and_mark_operation_ready sets ready_for_closure, needing inspection cleared, lab_result available, and no config1 or config2.  
- Without setting ready_for_funding, finalize_operation_and_mark_cleared can immediately finalize, achieving biosecurity clearance.  

## Staging Assets Strategically  
- Stage_deployment_asset without config requires units ready, zone inspected, and route verified, keeping options open for later verification.  
- This approach ensures not config1 or config2, aligning with requirements for attach_laboratory_result_and_mark_operation_ready.  

## Managing Shared Resources  
- Multiple operations share resources like assessment_kit, specialist_team, decon_kit, and lab_result, requiring careful sequencing for reuse.  
- Contingency_resources and salvage are limited but reusable, freed after reallocation, supporting multiple entity reinstatements.  

## Sequencing Unit Reinstatement  
- Reinstate units by first achieving biosecurity clearance via mark_primary_unit_cleared, needing prepared units and staged assets.  
- Apply salvage requires kit assigned, salvage available, and cleared status, followed by reallocate_resource_and_reinstate to free resources.

## Ensuring Unit Readiness  
- Inspecting zones first ensures compliance for staging, using inspect_inundation_zone_by_primary_unit, requiring assessed units, kit assignment, and no prior inspection or supply.  
- Prepare units for readiness via prepare_primary_unit_with_team, needing assessed status, team assignment, and inspected zones, setting units as prepared and ready.  

## Managing Supply Deployment  
- Deploying supplies via deploy_supply_to_primary sets units prepared and zones supplied, requiring assessed units and available supplies, but makes supplies unavailable.  
- Finalizing unit inspection with finalize_primary_unit_inspection restores supply availability, requiring assessed units, kit assignment, and supplied zones, ensuring readiness.  

## Staging Without Configuration  
- Stage_deployment_asset without config requires prepared and ready units, inspected zones, and verified routes, keeping flexibility for later steps.  
- This approach aligns with no config1 or config2, supporting subsequent verification processes like attach_laboratory_result_and_mark_operation_ready.

## Handling Resource Constraints  
- Only three contingency resources (cr1, cr2, cr3) are available for four entities, creating a sequencing challenge.  
- To triage all entities, resources must be reused by completing and reinstating one entity first to free up a contingency resource for others.  

## Sequencing Operations  
- Staging assets requires both primary and secondary units to be prepared and ready, complicating sequential processing of operations.  
- Operations share a single specialist team and kits, requiring careful sequencing to ensure resources are available for decon and verification steps.  

## Planning Entity Registration  
- Register all four entities (primary_response_unit_1, secondary_response_unit_1, recovery_operation_1, recovery_operation_2) to start the process.  
- Allocate contingency resources initially to three entities, planning to reinstate one early to free resources for the fourth.

## Completing Operations  
- Assigned assessment kit to primary unit P1, enabling asset confirmation and kit return, leaving both units prepared and ready for later steps.  
- For recovery operation O1, triaged with available contingency resource cr3, assessed, and completed the full path including verification, clearing, and finalization.  

## Reinstating Resources  
- After O1 was biosecurity cleared, applied salvage and reinstated it, freeing up cr3 for reuse.  
- This process allows triaging and processing recovery operation O2 with the now-available cr3, repeating the sequence for completion.

## Processing Operation O2  
- Triaged O2 with available contingency resource cr3, allocating it and marking O2 as triaged, freeing cr3 for later steps.  
- Assessed O2, processed inspection report report2 linked to asset1, and verified operation, ensuring readiness for subsequent stages.  

## Managing Resource Reuse  
- Returned laboratory result after O1 to make it available for O2, enabling attach_laboratory_result_and_mark_operation_ready for O2.  
- Reinstated O2 after salvage, freeing cr3, allowing reuse for other entities and ensuring all operations are processed sequentially.  

## Finalizing Unit Clearance  
- Marked primary unit P1 and secondary unit S1 as biosecurity cleared after confirming both were prepared and ready, linked to asset1.  
- Applied salvage to P1 and S1, reinstating both and freeing cr1 and cr2, completing the process for all four entities.

## Finalizing Operations  
- Finalized recovery operation O1 after attaching lab results and marking it cleared.  
- Applied salvage to O1, reinstating it and freeing contingency resource cr3 for reuse.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
